reviews.review_msg: Very friendly, helpful, and enthusiastic prof to take classes with!  The weekly readings are mandatory (as it's required for the papers) but they're not difficult.  Tutorials becomes very helpful for the papers and the exams. (Mike or Michaele is a good TA to have!) Definitely one of the best History classes I've ever had!  :)

An enjoyable class. He's quite lenient when it comes to marking. The class consisted of 4 quizzes, a take-home mid-term and a final. The only problem someone might have is that his accent can be difficult to understand, other wise he's great. Tutorial is very crucial and will help you a lot. Expect readings every week and keep up with them!

I love this guy! He made history so much more fun and made me want to stay in school! He's SUPER friendly and HILARIOUS when he mummbles to himself. It's adorable. He's great and always ready to help you out. TAKE HIS CLASSES!!! And his children look like Dora the explorer :)!!!

Wonderful prof. Readings are manageable compared to other 400 level courses. Extremely nice and accommodating. If you're looking to dive into a 400 level course within the History department look no further.
